title: 平台规则：Shopify AI 编程工具变化
summary: Your store includes a default agents.md file accessible at /agents.md . The paths /llms.txt and /llms-full.txt also point to this content by default. Add any of the following templates under Online Store > Themes > Edit code to serve different content per path: templates/agents.md.liquid — controls /agents.md (and the default for the other two paths) templates/llms.txt.liquid — controls /llms.txt only templates/llms-full.txt.liquid — controls /llms-full.txt only If no template is present for a given path, it falls back to your agents.md template, then to the Shopify-generated default. See the updated documentation for more details.

investigation_direction: 优先追官方政策、开发者公告、执行范围、受影响人群和合规边界。

当前仅适合简报观察，不宜写成深度结论。

facts.claim: Shopify Developer Changelog 发布/收录了这条原始线索：Customize /llms.txt, /llms-full.txt and /agents.md
